displayNameZh: 要促成第一笔 KOL 合作不容易
summary: Yt First Deal Hard component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「要促成第一笔 KOL 合作不容易」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-first-deal-hard/src/YtFirstDealHard.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtFirstDealHard` and `ytFirstDealHardDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt First Deal Hard Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-first-deal-hard to my project. Preserve the exported YtFirstDealHardProps API and register the YtFirstDealHard composition with the default props.
